'''Race Kartan''' was a notorious [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who flew a personal [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] called ''[[Duergo]]'' around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Occupation of Karthakk]].

At some point prior to the [[Battle of Nod Kartha]], Race Kartan was hunted down by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Fett tracked Kartan to a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] where his [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] engaged the ''Duergo'' in a dogfight within the station's [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]]. Kartan was unable to overcome his pursuer, and his vessel was disabled, presumably allowing Fett to collect the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]].

Kartan was an acquaintance of the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] mechanic [[Reti]], who arrived to aid the smuggler during his battle with Fett. Reti soon fled, however, and it may have been this incident that led to Fett pursuing a bounty on Reti's head prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==Behind the scenes==
The capture of Race Kartan is depicted in "Jango Fett", a bonus mission in ''Jedi Starfighter''.

*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
